node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Pooling & local aggregation is modeled as depending on Convolution & local filters, Statistics & experimental design and feeding downstream nodes such as Message passing & neighborhood aggregation, Convolutional neural networks, Graph neural networks.

limitations: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Convolution & local filters, Statistics & experimental design.
